title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kinemon, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: long, long ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their journey started on the back of an elephant....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Centuries back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We minks made a solemn vow...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: With the Kozuki clan Samuel of Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We are family!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We promised that we would always...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: assist one another when faced with hardships.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't know when that time will come...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But we...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Wano, huh...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'd love to see the outside world-nya!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey!! Where can we find this island!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard there were a bunch of different ones!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right!! There's more than five islands in the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There are that many!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm hungry- nya.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: waaaah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Dammit All!!! Want is Horrible!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyaaah!! I have nothing to do with them!!! I am a kappa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kippa is still a demon, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DOGGONE!! We SHOULD NEVER HAVE GOVE OUT TO SEA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We shouldn't have come here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Our Family!!? Yeah, right!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A cat monster, a dog monster, and a kappa....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this beach cursed!? Burn them at the stake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Jeez!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Phew...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now I have enough ingredients to make tonight's open...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You should all be ashamed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being afraid of those who look different only highlights your ignorance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you bully a bunch of kids!? Dis- graceful!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now, then... FARE- WELL!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're leaving us like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Kuri - Kuri Castle

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WHAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did you bring these monsters here, Sir Oden!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They followed me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Thank you for helping us back there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Auff...

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: think Tribe INUARASHI

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We were already starving...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: think Tribe Nekomanushi

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: when we were almost beaten to death!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PURRR... Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya Nya N

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is so hot!! There's no way I can eat it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is hard to believe... they really are talking animals...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The MINK Tribe!! My father mentioned it to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, I bet he did!! An inscription in our country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mentions our bond, too!! You're our family!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huff... PDF...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And now you're our Saviour as well!! Still...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 55 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
